description: Lap 1 restricts the wide-open security group to a single HTTPS ingress rule from a specific CIDR, a single HTTPS egress rule, and adds rule descriptions (real fixes confirmed live against checkov 3.3.0 clearing all 6 findings). checkov reports summary.failed == 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Ran checkov -d seed/ --output json. aws_security_group.wide_open trips CKV_AWS_24/23/25/260/277/382 by allowing 0.0.0.0/0 on all ports both directions with no rule descriptions. Restricting to HTTPS-only ingress from a named CIDR, HTTPS-only egress, and adding descriptions.
interactions.notes: The fix — checkov now reports summary.failed == 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
